# Golden file: kubernetes.kubectl pack
format: v1
---
# D1: delete namespace
command: kubectl delete namespace prod
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: kubernetes.kubectl
rule: kubectl-delete-namespace
---
# D2: delete deployment
command: kubectl delete deployment web
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: kubernetes.kubectl
rule: kubectl-delete-workload
---
# D3: delete pod catch-all
command: kubectl delete pod mypod
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: kubernetes.kubectl
rule: kubectl-delete-resource
---
# D4: drain
command: kubectl drain node-1 --ignore-daemonsets
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: kubernetes.kubectl
rule: kubectl-drain
---
# Safe: kubectl get
command: kubectl get pods
decision: Allow
